_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: SB mutagenesis significantly enhanced neurofibroma formation (~35%, p=0.0155) and induced grade 3 PNST formation in EGFR-overexpressing mice (p=0.0141)
details: SB mutagenesis significantly enhanced neurofibroma formation (~35%, p=0.0155) and induced grade 3 PNST formation in EGFR-overexpressing mice (p=0.0141)
